title: centaurea pallescens var. hyalolepis
intro: Centaurea pallescens var. hyalolepis, also known as mountain centaury, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, characterized by its tall stems and yellowish flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of mountain centaury include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote overall well-being. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
